text.title: Requirements Documentation Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real applications of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Requirement statement specifies a library or framework ('using Redis...').
antipattern.fix: Forbid library / framework names in requirement.statement; surface in design.md instead.

antipattern.symptom: Requirement is documented without acceptance criteria.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treats AC as optional decoration.
antipattern.fix: Require ≥1 acceptance_criteria entry per requirement; reject empty list.

antipattern.symptom: review_state=approved but no reviewer signature or timestamp captured.
antipattern.fix: Require reviewer_email + reviewed_at on approved state.
